creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: marcus
Date: Fri Apr 21 19:50:59 UTC 2017
New revision: 439128
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/439128

Log:
  Update to 2.17.8.

  * Check for use of OPT_XXX_OFF syntax to prevent false incorrect option
    usage assertions. [1]
  * Remove now-obsolete warning about using :LU operators with make(1). [2]
  * Fix the regex to prevent direct command use from hittin on lines
    like FOO_USES=... [3]

  PR:		218260 [1]
  		218325 [2]
  		218672 [3]
  Submitted by:	jrm [2]
  Reported by:	rezny [2]

  head/ports-mgmt/portlint/src/portlint.pl
